instruction:
If the function $y=y(x)$ is determined by the equation ${{text{e}}^{x+y}}=xy+1$, then ( ).

Options:
A. $text{d}x=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}+y}{x-{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}y$
B. $text{d}x=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}-y}{x-{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}y$
C. $text{d}x=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}-y}{y-{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}y$
D. $text{d}x=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}-x}{y-{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}y$
E. $text{d}x=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}-x}{y+{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}y$
F. $text{d}x=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}+x}{y+{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}y$
G. $text{d}y=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}+x}{y+{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}x$
H. $text{d}y=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}-y}{x-{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}x$
I. $text{d}y=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}-x}{y-{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}x$
J. $text{d}x=frac{{{text{e}}^{x+y}}+y}{x+{{text{e}}^{x+y}}}text{d}y$
